narrative: Middle East tensions persist as Trump signals the Iran conflict may conclude soon, introducing a geopolitical risk premium to the complex. USD/JPY firms to 157.19 as the 300bp Fed-BoJ carry advantage offsets risk-premium demand; USD/CHF trades at 0.7779 as traders test the 100-hour MA. Gold lower -0.11%; equities +0.25%; DXY +0.03%; VIX 18.1. Watch RBNZ rate decision May 27 for the next G8 policy catalyst.
